tabs.label: Schema

description: Renders a set of values as links into a faceted search — a "tag cloud" of shortcuts. Each value links to a search page with ?facet.<index>=<value> pre-set, which a Search block reads from the URL.

parent.description: Block reference: schema, JSON, and rendered examples for every block type Volto Hydra ships.
parent.title: Examples

title: Search Shortcuts Block
